Streamlit Complete Reference Notes Streamlit is an open-source Python framework for building interactive web apps for data science and machine learning  with no front-end experience required. You write pure Python, and Streamlit renders the UI in a browser. Every time a user interacts with a widget, the script reruns from top to bottom.
